title: Investigate recent procedure failures and summarize causes

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Recent procedure failure summary so far: Medication Review Dosage, Medication Review Individual Confirmation, and Suco Income/Name all failed in the final task-output attachment persistence step with the same error: AMPLIFY_STORAGE_TASKATTACHMENTS_BUCKET_NAME missing in the CLI process. Investigating a config-loader-backed fix so attachment-only persistence works in standard procedure runs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verified recent procedure failures share one cause: task-output attachment bucket resolution. Running focused task-output storage and experiment-runner regressions before restarting the Suco optimizer.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Restarted Suco optimizer after confirming focused task-output attachment tests passed. New procedure: 62ddaa87-6475-4f8a-a4a1-3f6bde0812f2. New task: a8d55acd-c6e3-47cc-ba20-c333bd914370.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Branch-cleanup note: the attachment-only task-output persistence follow-up and canonical bucket-resolution fixes are part of the current dirty worktree on chore/med-review-guideline-scope-audit. This cleanup commit will preserve the shared task_output_storage/CommandTasks changes before the next optimizer-behavior branch is created.
